lessons.title: The Physical Perimeter 🏢
lessons.description: Why the front door is often the weakest link. Understanding physical security layers.

lessons.title: Tailgating & Piggybacking 🚪
lessons.description: The art of following someone through a secure door. Politeness as a vulnerability.

lessons.title: The Clipboard Method & Props 📋
lessons.description: Uniforms, toolkits, and the universal symbol of authority: the clipboard.

lessons.title: Bypassing Guards & Reception 🛡️
lessons.description: Social engineering the human firewall. Misdirection, confidence, and the 'visitor' playbook.

lessons.title: Exit Strategies & Situational Awareness 🚶
lessons.description: Getting out clean. Blending in, avoiding cameras, and knowing when to abort.
